generationPolicy.inventoryBasis: all regular files under the repository root after explicit exclusion policy
generationPolicy.classificationRule: explicit root/path mappings in scripts/generate-kb-manifest.py; unmatched maintained paths fail generation
notes: Reference snapshots and vendored example dependencies are excluded from maintained curated KB coverage.
The manifest and audit report outputs are excluded to avoid self-referential hashes and dynamic audit durations.
Agent routes and task recipes are derived from data/agent-index.json and data/task-recipes.json at generation time.
